results.title: Lobo runner Habtom Samuel wins NCAA 5K semifinal
results.description: For the third straight year, Habtom Samuel will be on double duty at the NCAA Outdoor Track and Field Championships. New Mexico’s star junior finished the men’s 5,000-meter semifinal in 13 minutes and 38.12 seconds Friday at the NCAA West Regional Preliminaries, qualifying for his second race at the NCAA Outdoor Track and Field Championships in Eugene, Oregon. results.title: Watch: Gill shares a heartwarming moment with parents after GT reach Final
results.description: Shubman Gill's spectacular century powered Gujarat Titans to a record-breaking chase in IPL 2026 Qualifier 2, securing their spot in the final. He was celebrated with his family after the thrilling 7-wicket victory over Rajasthan Royals. The Titans now head to Ahmedabad to face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in a highly anticipated title clash.
